mission_name: Mars Regolith Bioremediation and Soil Conditioning
objective: Design radiation-hardened microbial consortia to convert Martian regolith perchlorates into bioavailable nutrients, enabling closed-loop soil conditioning for future ISRU greenhouses.

stages.name: mission_compile
stages.goal: Normalize mission intent, chassis limits, and safety posture into a machine-checkable plan.

stages.name: ensemble_genome_design
stages.goal: Use evo2, generator, alphagenome to score variants, embed genomic neighborhoods, and propose candidate regulatory programs for Deinococcus_radiodurans, Chroococcidiopsis_thermalis, Bacillus_subtilis.

stages.name: epigenomic_landscape
stages.goal: Analyze chromatin accessibility patterns and plan CRE perturbation simulations for regulatory targets: radiation_response_CREs, perchlorate_reductase_promoters, desiccation_tolerance_enhancers.

stages.name: counterfactual_variant_atlas
stages.goal: Construct a counterfactual regulatory atlas that answers mission-specific what-if edit questions: What if we knockout the radiation response network?; What if desiccation tolerance is overexpressed?.

stages.name: protein_triage
stages.goal: Rank translated ORFs and enzyme candidates for deeper structural follow-up.

stages.name: cell_free_prototyping
stages.goal: Design cell-free validation experiments using Deinococcus_radiodurans_extract, Bacillus_subtilis_extract to test candidate constructs before committing to full chassis engineering.

stages.name: habitat_twin
stages.goal: Stress-test consortium behavior against habitat shocks and deployment conditions: radiation_burst, temperature_swing, dust_storm_occlusion, perchlorate_spike.

stages.name: multiobjective_frontier
stages.goal: Compute a Pareto frontier across mission tradeoffs to avoid collapsing the search into a single score. Frontier objectives: perchlorate_reduction_rate, radiation_survival_probability, energy_efficiency.

stages.name: bayesian_experiment_design
stages.goal: Plan adaptive Bayesian optimization loops to maximize perchlorate_reduction_rate over search dimensions [temperature, UV_shielding, nutrient_concentration, water_activity] using expected_improvement acquisition with batch size 4 for up to 50 iterations.
stages.engine: BO acquisition planner with cognitive digital twin

stages.name: controller_design
stages.goal: Compile a BioControl DSL policy over the control surface: temperature, UV_shielding, nutrient_feed, water_recycling, atmospheric_mix, perchlorate_quench. Include sim-to-real transfer bridge from mars_analog_bioreactor to martian_regolith_in_situ.
stages.engine: BioControl DSL planner + Sim-to-Real Transfer Bridge

stages.name: safety_red_team
stages.goal: Stress-test the proposed plan against misuse, blocked traits, autonomy creep, and hidden safety regressions. Disallowed traits: antibiotic_selection_marker, mammalian_pathogenicity_signal, uncontained_horizontal_gene_transfer.

stages.name: fair_provenance_bundle
stages.goal: Package the twin as a FAIR artifact bundle with explicit provenance, model lineage, and assay traceability targets for models, workflow_scripts, assay_data.

stages.name: orchestration_and_review
stages.goal: Assemble the pipeline into an auditable run with artifacts, retries, and human review.

warnings: Sim-to-real transfer is configured without an operational safety envelope.
recommended_next_steps: Resolve the validation warnings before promoting any controller or genome proposal.
Run the declared cell-free validation matrix before organism-level engineering.
Calibrate the sim-to-real bridge in an Earth-analog or pilot chamber before deployment.

validation_ladder.name: in_silico_ranking
validation_ladder.detail: Foundation-model ranking and safety triage can proceed locally.

validation_ladder.name: cell_free_validation
validation_ladder.detail: Cell-free extracts are configured for fast validation.

validation_ladder.name: analog_environment
validation_ladder.detail: Analog chamber or structured habitat validation is needed before transfer.

validation_ladder.name: controller_commit
validation_ladder.detail: Controller commits should remain blocked until an operational envelope is defined.

validation_ladder.name: pilot_deployment
validation_ladder.detail: Deployment remains blocked by policy unless human review clears a staged pilot.

counterfactual_map.target: What if we knockout the radiation response network
counterfactual_map.note: Planner preview only. Use this as a review prompt, not empirical evidence.

counterfactual_map.target: What if desiccation tolerance is overexpressed
counterfactual_map.note: Planner preview only. Use this as a review prompt, not empirical evidence.
